name: Courtyard
description: An open cobblestone yard enclosed by crumbling keep walls, weeds pushing through the gaps between stones. To the west the barked orders of drill instructors and the clack of practice weapons carry from the Training Yard, where the keep's newest recruits find their footing. The eastern archway tells a different story: thick grey webs choke its mouth, and a dry skittering drifts out of the dark beyond. Quieter passages lead south to a rocky alcove and north toward the treeline.
ambient_messages: A dry clicking of mandibles echoes faintly from the webbed archway to the east.
From the west drift the barked orders of a drill instructor and the clatter of practice blades.
Something skitters over stone in the darkness beyond the eastern arch, then falls still.
